---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement for Hayvenhurst.
title: "[feature] "
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Hayvenhurst v1 has a deliberately narrow scope (see ROADMAP.md). Larger ideas
may still be valuable but might land in v1.x or v2 rather than the v1.0 line.
Be honest about scope so the discussion stays grounded.
-->

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Who experiences it? Concrete examples
land better than abstract framings.

## Proposed solution

What would you like Hayvenhurst to do? If you have a sketch of the CLI or API
surface, include it.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside. "Just use grep"
is a fair alternative to mention if you considered and rejected it.

## Scope

Which release line does this belong in? Pick one and explain briefly:

- [ ] v1.0 (must-have for launch)
- [ ] v1.x (post-launch, before v2)
- [ ] v2 (commercial line / out of scope for the open-source v1)
- [ ] Not sure — would like maintainer input
